name: Tanko.io
author: Poki
description: To the tanks! That’s where the action is in this multiplayer IO game. Choose your side: Allies or Soviet Union? Shoot down enemy tanks to grow larger and more indestructible. Be the first to destroy the other team’s base to win the match. How long will you last in this tank versus tank shootout? Controls: WASD or arrow keys - Move tank Left mouse button - Shoot
